creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
With LLDB-option disabled, the install succeeds -- and there are Python bits too:

% env LANG=C ls -l /opt/lib/python3.6/site-packages/lit40/
total 164
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   5569 Jun 27 16:04 LitConfig.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel    854 Jun 27 16:04 LitTestCase.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  10717 Jun 27 16:04 ProgressBar.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   2696 Jun 27 16:04 ShCommands.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   7575 Jun 27 16:04 ShUtil.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   8541 Jun 27 16:04 Test.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  38543 Jun 27 16:04 TestRunner.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   5932 Jun 27 16:04 TestingConfig.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel    222 Jun 27 16:04 __init__.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   9069 Jun 27 16:04 discovery.py
drwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel    512 Jun 27 16:04 formats
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  22797 Jun 27 16:04 main.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  10088 Jun 27 16:04 run.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   9754 Jun 27 16:04 util.py
